common: Sulph and Quicksilver, or Black Sulphide Mercury (AETHIOPS MERCURIALIS-MINERALIS)

skin.text: Eruptions. Favus-like, scrofulous, herpetic and eczematous

dosing.notes: The lower triturations, especially the second decimal

keynotes.text: color="#800000">AETHIOPS MINERALIS Sulph and Quicksilver, or Black Sulphide Mercury (AETHIOPS MERCURIALIS-MINERALIS) This preparation is of use in scrofulous affections, ophthalmia, otorrhœa, painful, irritating, scabby eruptions, hereditary syphilis.
